Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Potion, Bioblaster & Interrupt toggles are left unchanged. This is on purpose, I leave this up to the user.

Logics.Name: Tactician + Dismantle
Logics.Description:
Tactitian prio, Dismantle fallback. Shouldn't overlap this way.
Also prevents override on Troubador or Shield Samba.

Items.Name: OnWipe Reset
Items.Description: Opener, Resets toggles, also resets toggles on zone change.

Items.Name: Automit
Items.Description: Tactician + Dismantle, and automatic second wind.
